name: Oxy Fudge
recipeInstructions:
Combine sugar, evaporated milk, and a dash of salt in a large saucepan. Boil over medium heat for 14 minutes after the mixture comes to a full boil, stirring occasionally.
While the syrup is cooking, place butter, chocolate pieces, and a dash of salt in a large mixing bowl.
After the syrup is cooked, pour it over the butter and chocolate mixture in the bowl. Blend at low speed first, then beat at high speed for 10 minutes.
Add nuts and vanilla, stirring to blend.
Pour the fudge into a greased 13 by 9 inch pan and chill until firm. Makes about 4 pounds.
